lintExempt.rationale: Re-affirmed 2026-04-15 (task #22 audit, post-v0.20.0 / post-PR #208). These phase JSONs are shipped historical execution records of PH-01 through PH-04 work; no automated runtime consumer exists (verified: zero grep hits in `server/**`, zero references in `.github/workflows/ci.yml`, zero usage in test suites, ac-lint is a pure function library that only runs on caller-supplied plans). The only voluntary consumer is `forge_lint_refresh planPath=<this-file>`, which is an audit-time operation against a specific path and would only re-surface pre-existing F-55/F-56 violations describing already-shipped work. Live drift in newly authored plans is prevented by `npm run lint` (CI-enforced via PR #208) and per-call ac-lint, not by retroactive cleanup of historical records. Original C1-bootstrap "we'll unwind later" framing superseded — exemption retained as the correct end-state for shipped artifacts. Unwind via `grep -l 2026-04-13-c1-bootstrap .ai-workspace/plans/*.json` only if a future runtime consumer is added that would load these files automatically.

acceptanceCriteria.description: EvalReport and CriterionResult interfaces are exported from server/types/eval-report.ts
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx tsc --noEmit && grep -q 'export interface EvalReport' server/types/eval-report.ts && grep -q 'export interface CriterionResult' server/types/eval-report.ts && echo PASS

acceptanceCriteria.description: validateEvalReport returns valid:true for a correct report
validateEvalReport returns valid:false for missing storyId

stories.title: Shell command executor with timeout and output capture

acceptanceCriteria.description: executeCommand runs a passing command and returns status PASS with captured stdout
executeCommand runs a failing command and returns status FAIL
executeCommand times out and returns status FAIL with timeout evidence

stories.title: Story evaluator pipeline — run all ACs and produce eval report

acceptanceCriteria.description: evaluateStory returns PASS verdict when all ACs pass
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/lib/evaluator.test.ts -t 'returns PASS when all ACs pass' && echo PASS

acceptanceCriteria.description: evaluateStory returns FAIL verdict when any AC fails
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/lib/evaluator.test.ts -t 'returns FAIL when any AC fails' && echo PASS

acceptanceCriteria.description: evaluateStory throws when storyId not found in plan
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/lib/evaluator.test.ts -t 'throws when story not found' && echo PASS

acceptanceCriteria.description: evaluateStory captures stdout and stderr as evidence for each AC
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/lib/evaluator.test.ts -t 'captures evidence' && echo PASS

acceptanceCriteria.description: evaluateStory returns INCONCLUSIVE when command execution fails (e.g., binary not found)
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/lib/evaluator.test.ts -t 'returns INCONCLUSIVE' && echo PASS

stories.title: MCP tool integration — replace placeholder with real forge_evaluate

acceptanceCriteria.description: forge_evaluate input schema accepts storyId (required), planPath (optional), planJson (optional), timeoutMs (optional)
acceptanceCriteria.command: grep -q 'storyId' server/tools/evaluate.ts && grep -q 'planPath' server/tools/evaluate.ts && grep -q 'planJson' server/tools/evaluate.ts && grep -q 'timeoutMs' server/tools/evaluate.ts && echo PASS

acceptanceCriteria.description: forge_evaluate returns eval report JSON in MCP response format
acceptanceCriteria.command: npx vitest run server/tools/evaluate.test.ts -t 'returns eval report' && echo PASS
